title: OCME — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Office of Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the one OCME NYC Open Data asset (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/ocme, the NYC 311 request channel, and the federal NamUs missing-persons system. Includes the NYC geography spine and a deliberately NON-IDENTIFYING case reference — OCME's core object (a death investigation) is confidential and is never modeled here at a per-decedent, clinical level of detail.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

MannerOfDeath.description: The five statutory manners of death an OCME investigation may certify, plus pending/undetermined. Used only in AGGREGATE statistics, never against an individual.

CaseReference.description: A deliberately NON-IDENTIFYING reference to an OCME death-investigation case. Carries the OCME case number and, for a records request, the minimum a requester supplies to locate a case — never clinical findings, cause of death, or investigative detail.

caseNumber.description: OCME case / accession number (ME number), if known to the requester.

decedentLastName.description: Decedent surname, as supplied by the requester to locate the case.

decedentFirstName.description: Decedent given name, as supplied by the requester.

dateOfDeath.description: Approximate or known date of death, to disambiguate the case.

ContactPerson.description: Contact details for a requester or point of contact.
